rulings.Case Title: JACK WARREN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS 'B*P' AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Extend Discovery Up To The October 11, 2011 Trial Date;
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, September 22, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant William Lyon Homes, Inc.¿s motion to extend discovery up to the October 11, 2011 trial date is denied. The court¿s September 21 ruling on defendant¿s motion to continue the trial date and to reopen discovery provides sufficient relief for defendant due to plaintiffs¿ recent production of documents that should have been produced previously. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Further Responses To Its Request For Admissions; Verifications To All Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, September 22, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant McCord Corporation¿s motion to compel further responses to its request for admissions is granted. Plaintiffs¿ supplemental responses, like its earlier responses, are not code-compliant. In fact, by incorporating their prior responses into their supplemental responses, plaintiffs¿ supplemental responses are even more evasive and less straight-forward than their initial responses. Defendant is awarded sanctions of $675 against plaintiffs¿ counsel which must be paid no later than October7, 2011. There is no substantial justification for plaintiffs¿ supplemental responses. = (220/HEK)
